[...]
Employer Moderna, Inc. Location Cambridge, Massachusetts Start date May 25, 2026

Moderna is seeking a Principal Scientist to support the AI-enabled design of de novo antibodies and binder modalities across diverse discovery programs. This is a hands-on, highly technical role for an experienced protein designer who can build and operationalize agentic AI design frameworks and translate modern generative methods into validated binders.
